## Low-Confidence Recipes (Unmatched Ingredients)

**None.** Every ingredient in all 100 recipes resolved to a table entry.

## Methodology Notes

- Per-100g reference values sourced from USDA FoodData Central (SR Legacy / Foundation Foods) and BLS (Bundeslebensmittelschlüssel).
- Calories are derived via Atwater (4×P + 4×C + 9×F) for internal consistency; they are NOT taken from the per-100g kcal entry directly.
-  is the total for all ; macros are per-serving.
- Liquids (ml) are treated at 1 g/ml density (water-density assumption).
- Countable items (eggs, onions, garlic cloves, etc.) use per-item gram weights from the nutrition table.
- Pre-cooked rice and dry rice have separate table entries (≈130 vs 360 kcal/100g); several Quick Cook recipes using microwave pouches were previously under-estimated because they used dry-rice values.
